name: com.vcore.client
description: Reusable client for the V-CORE adaptive-VR backend. Provides the Object-Status Manifest + Status-Change loop (Contract 3), upstream behaviour and VR-context reporters (Contracts 4 & 5), a spectator camera, and one-component setup via VCoreLauncher / the VCore prefab. Optional LiveKit video publishing compiles only when the LiveKit Unity SDK is installed.
